headline: Chevy's Least-Sold SUV Is Costing The Company Tons Of Money
summary: Despite Chevy's long history and general popularity, not all of their models are a success. This SUV in particular is barely selling in 2026.

headline: This Trump-linked startup plans to put humanoid robots in the military
summary: With ties to the Trump family,  Foundation Robotics Labs is aiming to deploy humanoid robots in the military in the next 12 to 18 months.
